CONTENT.Career: Ioannis Gelios was under contract with the professionals of FC Augsburg for eight years, but did not play a single minute in a competitive game. It was only when he switched to Hansa Rostock that he became a regular goalkeeper.He became one of the best goalkeepers in the third division and Holstein Kiel offered him a three years contract in the summer of 2019. He also moved to a higher category, to become a member of the 2.Bundesliga. Out of the 34 matches of the first season, he played in 26. He conceded 42 goals and four times 'kept' his home clean.
CONTENT.Personal life: Gelios' family hails from Dasochori, Serres.On 9 April 2021, he tested positive for COVID-19.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played on 22:01, 08 May 2022 (UTC).

SUMMARY: Ioannis Gelios (Greek: Ιωάννης Γκέλιος; born 24 April 1992) is a Greek professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Super League club Athens Kallithea.
